features.name: macromodule declaration with parameters and ports
features.description: Code should include a macromodule declaration with parameters and I/O ports

features.name: macromodule instantiation with positional parameters
features.description: Code should include a macromodule instantiation with positional parameter assignments
features.snippet: submod #(-3'sd1, -3'sd1) foo (a, b, y1, y2, y3, y4);

features.name: macromodule instantiation with named parameters
features.description: Code should include a macromodule instantiation with named parameter overrides using dot notation

features.name: task defined in macromodule called from parent module
features.description: Code should include a task defined inside a macromodule that is called via instantiated interface from parent module

features.name: macromodule with function and reg internal state
features.description: Code should include a macromodule containing both functions and tasks with internal reg state
